name: Okra, Corn and Tomato Melange
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the chopped onion in bacon drippings.
2. Add the okra and cook for 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Add the corn kernels, tomatoes, green pepper, sugar, salt, and Tabasco sauce.
4. Cover and simmer until done (about 25 minutes), stirring occasionally.
5. Correct seasoning if needed.
6. Pour into serving dish and sprinkle with crumbled bacon.
